CRISPR, used since 2013 in conditions like beta-thalassemia, edits DNA via homology-directed repair or non-homologous end joining but risks off-target effects."}], :tokens {:input 1835, :output 912, :reasoning 0, :total 2747}, :cost {:input-cost 0.0045874999999999996, :output-cost 0.00912, :total-cost 0.0137075}, :duration-ms 5.43E-4}), :ns com.blockether.svar.core-test, :file "com/blockether/svar/core_test.clj", :type :lazytest/expectation-failed, :column 29, :line 916, :expected (vector? result), :actual false, :message nil}
